title: Bat Removal & Exclusion in Bedford, Westchester
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Bedford, Westchester. Humane, safe bat control for homes and estates. Licensed experts. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Bats in your Bedford attic or property can pose serious health risks and cause structural damage if not handled properly. Best Pest Control NYC provides professional, humane bat removal and exclusion services throughout Bedford and Westchester County, ensuring your home or estate is safely bat-free. Our certified technicians use proven methods to remove bats and prevent re-entry, protecting your family and property.
whyUs: With years of experience serving Bedford's unique residential properties, from historic estates to modern homes, we understand the specific bat control challenges in Westchester. Our licensed professionals provide thorough inspections, humane removal, complete exclusion work, and cleanup services with guaranteed results.
localContext: Bedford's wooded landscapes and large properties, including areas near Bedford Village Historic District and near reservoirs, create ideal habitats for bats seeking shelter in attics, barns, and outbuildings. The area's many older homes and estate properties with multiple structures require specialized bat exclusion strategies to ensure complete protection.

faqs.question: How much does bat removal cost in Bedford?
faqs.answer: Bat removal and exclusion services in Bedford typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the size of your property, the extent of the infestation, number of entry points, and whether guano cleanup is needed. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before any work begins.

faqs.question: Is bat removal in Bedford legal and humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, we follow all New York State regulations regarding bat removal, which prohibit exclusion during maternity season (May-August) when young bats are present. Our methods are completely humane, using one-way exclusion devices that allow bats to leave naturally but prevent re-entry, never harming the animals.

faqs.question: What are signs of bats in my Bedford home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include squeaking or scratching sounds at dusk or dawn, dark stains near entry points, accumulation of guano (bat droppings) in attics or near buildings, strong ammonia-like odors, and seeing bats flying around your property at sunset. If you notice any of these signs, contact us immediately for an inspection.

faqs.question: How long does bat exclusion take in Bedford?
faqs.answer: The exclusion process typically takes 1-3 days for installation, but the complete removal can take 3-7 days as bats naturally exit through one-way devices. We then return to seal all entry points permanently. The timeline depends on colony size and the number of access points in your Bedford property.
